lesson.menu_desc: Review aulas 1-6: word bank + grammar toolbox -- to be, have/has, present simple, time, some/any -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- Review 1: Putting It All Together
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 7 -- Review 1: Putting It All Together

listenings.text: Hi, my name is Carla. Let me tell you about my life. I live with my family in a quiet neighborhood. Every day I have the same routine. I wake up at half past six and I drink some coffee. I start work at eight o'clock. I work in a busy office with a good colleague. We write a report every week. At lunch, I always eat a big meal with some fruit and some water. I have an appointment with my doctor on Friday. I am a happy and busy person.

Hello, I am Bruno. I want to tell you about my normal day. I live in a small neighborhood with my family. My routine is simple. I usually get up at seven o'clock and I am very hungry, so I eat some bread. I go to the office at nine o'clock. My colleague and I answer emails and finish a report. I never drink any coffee in the afternoon. At one o'clock I have my favorite meal, lunch. Tonight I have an appointment with a friend. I like my quiet life.

extra_audio.text: First, in the morning Erica wakes up and drinks some coffee. Second, she goes to the office. Third, she meets her colleague and they finish a report. Fourth, at noon she has a big meal. Fifth, in the evening she has an appointment with her family.
